docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GARIBOTTO, ALBERTO RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PEREZ, RUBEN $6,700.00 PRINCIPAL, $670.00 INTEREST, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,370.00, ($7500 CONTRACT BALANCE MINUS $800 IN PAYMENTS EQUALS $6,700). ONE YEAR OF INTEREST FROM DATE OF LAST PAYMENT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY GARIBOTTO, ALBERTO AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, RUBEN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAR-28-2013 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (SERVICE FEE $0.00) SERVED FEB-25-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PEREZ, RUBEN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU FILED BY GARIBOTTO, ALBERTO PEREZ, RUBEN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAR-28-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAR-28-2013 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. SPANISH INTERPRETER--FAERA TAYLOR FOR PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: M. GOODMAN. NOT REPORTED. (506)

APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GARIBOTTO, ALBERTO ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAR-28-2013 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-01-2013 ORDERED DESTROYED
